name: copper
description: Provides copper, an essential trace mineral nutrient.
raw_text: Ci 77400 (with Product List) Products Ingredients Decode INCI Login Register Login Register Products Ingredients Decode INCI Follow us on our new Insta page » Ci 77400 Also-called-like-this: Copper Powder, Bronze Powder What-it-does: colorant Official CosIng Information All Functions: cosmetic colorant Description: ci 77400 is classed chemically as an inorganic color. it is a finely powdered metal consisting chiefly of copper or an alloy of copper and zinc with small amounts of aluminum or tin.
